_comment: Copy to config.json (gitignored) and fill in your pool's values. The framework is pool-agnostic: it works against any prediction-pool site that exposes the DOM contract documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md. KGP97's Vercel app is the reference implementation.
_modelComment: Per-team (attack, defense) multipliers for the Poisson model. attack >1 = scores more; defense <1 = concedes fewer. These are generic football priors — edit for your competition. predict_model.py reads this table.
_baseGoals: Average goals per team per game (model baseline).
_eloComment: Elo-style ratings for the title-odds model (big_model.py). Edit for your field.
